understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately. Complete levels efficiently within the turn budget using both attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls you vertically until you land on a safe tile, hit a hazard, or reach the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) to open paths. GRAVITY direction (DOWN means y decreases; UP means y increases) determines fall direction. `left_landing`/`right_landing` and `corridor_scan` preview landing positions. UNDO can revert the previous action. Each level has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts. Spikes instantly terminate the attempt on landing.

history.summary: Level 1 completed after 98 turns.
Reached 1 level(s) after 98 turns.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately. Complete levels efficiently within the turn budget using both attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls you vertically until you land on a safe tile, hit a hazard, or reach the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) to open paths. GRAVITY direction (DOWN means y decreases; UP means y increases) determines fall direction. `left_landing`/`right_landing` and `corridor_scan` preview landing positions. UNDO can revert the previous action. Each level has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts. Spikes instantly terminate the attempt on landing.
